certification_basis: Conversation turns can attach canonical chain continuity evidence.
Prompt-to-conversation captures expose canonical_chain_id, current_chain_id, latest_chain_id, related_chain_id, and suggested inspection commands.
Interactive conversation preserves current chain continuity across turns where possible.
Continuity replay reconstruction detects corruption and fails closed.
The runtime does not create execution requests, dispatch workers, invoke workers, execute work, mutate governance, or mutate replay outside append-only evidence.
known_limitations: Conversation mode exposes and preserves chain ids, but it does not automatically run chain inspection commands after each turn.
Canonical chain id derivation for conversation-only sessions is deterministic but does not upgrade older non-chain replay evidence.
